SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marilou Samson, Appellant appearing on her own behalf, accompanied by her witness Edward Novak;
Liam Azulay, Respondent appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn in:

Liam Azulay Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. Testifies that the home inpectors were called on several occasions and the the home has been claimed as a hazzard. Also states that the claim with the San Francisco Rent Borad hearing was ruled in his favor. As of todays date Mr. Azulay has not recived any portion of his deposit bck from Appelland.

No new evidence by provided by Respondent at todays hearing.

Marilou Samson, Appellant testifies on her behalf. Ms Samson states that respondent never paid his utiities, complained that rent was not paid, appliances have been damaged by respondent. Appellant claims that she is in the process of Bankruptcy proceedings.

Edward Novak, Witness for Respondnent Marilou Samson testifies on behalf of respondent.
testafies to the fact that he is friendss with the appellant and helps the appellant with business matters and is constantly at the resident and knows first hand of the conditions of home.

The following documentary evidence is provided

Exhiit 1 group pictures of various conditions of the home inside the premises and outside the premisises of the home.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (525/JPT)
